config.name: burgers_equation
config.pde: BurgersEquationConfig(alpha=0.1, x_min=0.0, x_max=1.0, t_min=0.0, t_max=1.0, nu=0.01)
config.training: TrainingConfig(epochs=2000, learning_rate=0.01, optimizer_type='Adam', lambda_pde=1.0, lambda_consistency=0.15, lambda_initial=10.0, lambda_boundary=1.0, lr_decay=None, lr_decay_factor=0.1, lr_decay_steps=100, freeze_quantum=False, freeze_feature_map=False, freeze_readout=False)
